news.headline: In Photos and Video: President Trump Goes to China
news.summary: Mr. Trump’s trip, the first U.S. presidential visit to China in almost a decade, was closely watched for signs of whether a trade truce between the countries would hold.

news.headline: Imam, 54, who claimed ‘jinn powers’ jailed for life over abuse crimes against women and girls
